_meta.purpose: Data enrichment request for the Gemeny surname direct patrilineal line
instructions_for_enricher: This file contains all known data for the Gemeny surname direct line.
For each person, fields marked ENRICH_NEEDED have gaps that could potentially be filled by web research.
Research sources: FamilySearch.org, FindAGrave.com, Ancestry hints, newspapers.com, census records, vital records.
For each field you update, ADD a source entry to that person's 'sources_to_add' array with type and citation.
Do NOT fabricate data. If uncertain, use the 'confidence' field: 'high', 'medium', 'low', or 'speculative'.
Do NOT change existing confirmed data — only fill gaps or add new sources for existing data.
When done, return this entire JSON file with your additions filled in.
Living people (no death date) should NOT be researched for privacy — skip enrichment on those.
geographic_focus: Royal Oak / St. Michaels, Talbot County, Maryland

sources: Vital Records of Salem Marriages, Essex Inst. Pg 545
Family History Library, Salt Lake City, Film # 0761210
current_data.notes: Founding ancestor of every Gemeny in America. Origin unknown.
